seoTitle: Kentucky South vs Kerewong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kentucky South and Kerewong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kentucky South vs Kerewong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kentucky South and Kerewong.
heading: Kentucky South vs Kerewong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kentucky South, New South Wales and Kerewong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kentucky South has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Kerewong (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kentucky South or Kerewong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kentucky South has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Kerewong scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kentucky South scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Kerewong scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kentucky South or Kerewong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kentucky South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
